# StreamRoll
> AI-generated streaming intros for Plex, Jellyfin, and Emby

StreamRoll generates custom animated pre-roll video intros for home media servers using the Runway API. Users enter a service name and a visual style, and StreamRoll chains a text-to-image call with an image-to-video call to produce a downloadable .mp4 in about 30 seconds — the same idea as Netflix's "Tudum" logo sting, but for personal Plex, Jellyfin, or Emby setups.

## How it works

Two Runway API calls, chained:
1. textToImage — a style-tuned prompt produces a title card (1920×1080 or 1344×768 depending on model)
2. imageToVideo — that still frame animates into a 2–10 second intro

The output URL from step 1 is the input to step 2. The app exposes the generated Node.js code so users can reproduce the result in their own projects.

## Image models supported

- Runway Gen4 Image — creative, artistic style
- Runway Gen4 Image Turbo — faster, great quality
- OpenAI GPT Image 2 (via Runway) — precise instruction-following, 1920×1088
- Google Gemini Image 3 Pro (via Runway) — vivid, instruction-aware, 1344×768
- Google Gemini 2.5 Flash (via Runway) — fast, 1344×768

## Video models supported

- Runway Gen4 Turbo — fast, great quality (5 cr/s)
- Runway Gen4.5 — highest quality, supports timestamp-based motion scripting (12 cr/s)
- Runway Gen3a Turbo — previous generation (5 cr/s)
- Google Veo 3 (via Runway) — Google video model, supports audio generation (~25 cr/s)
- Google Veo 3.1 (via Runway) — Google latest (~25 cr/s)
- Google Veo 3.1 Fast (via Runway) — fast Google model (~15 cr/s)

## Visual styles (18 total)

Netflix/Prestige, Cinematic, Retro (80s neon), Futuristic, Minimal, Horror, Anime (shonen), Adult Swim, Cartoon Network, VHS, Grindhouse, Lo-fi, Vaporwave, Cyberpunk, HBO, Epic, Nature, Blockbuster

## Pages

- [Home](https://streamroll.vercel.app): The main generator — enter a name, pick a style, generate and download.
- [How it's built](https://streamroll.vercel.app/how-it-works): Technical walkthrough of the Runway API chaining pattern.
- [Setup](https://streamroll.vercel.app/setup): Add your Runway API key to get started.

## Tech stack

- Runway API (textToImage + imageToVideo) via @runwayml/sdk
- Next.js 16 App Router
- Deployed on Vercel
- BYOK — users supply their own Runway API key in the browser

## Author

Joe Karlsson — https://joekarlsson.com
